{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,

    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the inconsistency between the attention mechanism framing in the abstract and the selective state-space model described in the method section, proposing a revised draft under the more likely reading.",
    "R1.2": "The agent does not engage the argument chain as it only points out one internal inconsistency without suggesting repairs.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Mamba/S6) and articulates the delta between the proposed method and the standard selective SSM, but could have mapped against more works for a more comprehensive assessment.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the actual contribution), but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for other recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content but with one minor regression (the revised draft does not address the broader comparisons across datasets, horizons, and seeds as needed).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 1.0,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "blockers": []
}
